sharedPost.text:
Wow 😮 Amazing talent! ❤️❤️ 😮 The Shen Yun dancers performing under the California sun is so beautiful.
⚡️ Trust me — you'll want to see it live. Don't miss the magical and captivating experience of a live performance.
🎟️ Visit https://1kb.link/K0Piua for theater and ticket information 
Have a day full of joy and happiness ✨

items.text:
🔥 AVAILABLE FOR BOOKINGS – WORLD-CLASS ACROBATIC DUO 🔥
We are Bilak Brothers – twin acrobats from Ukraine, Guinness World Record holders in partner acrobatics and semi-finalists of Spain’s Got Talent & France’s Got Talent.

We offer high-impact, visually powerful performances for:
✨ Cabaret & dinner shows
✨ Cruise ships
✨ Corporate & luxury events
✨ TV & international productions

Our disciplines:
• Hand-to-hand
• Aerial straps (duo & solo)
• Cyr wheel
• Hand balancing

We are highly flexible and production-friendly — we adapt every act to your show, theme, and audience. We can also create completely new acts, including costumes and music, tailored specifically for your project.

📩 For bookings: [brothersbilak@gmail.com](mailto:brothersbilak@gmail.com)
🌐 Website: [https://www.bilakbrothers.com](https://www.bilakbrothers.com/)
📲 Instagram: [https://www.instagram.com/bilakbrothers](https://www.instagram.com/bilakbrothers)

Let’s create something unforgettable together!
Bilak Brothers

sharedPost.text:
WARNER BROS FEATURE FILM - EXODUS
Work Date: April 30th, 2026
Rate: $250/8 + $30 gas bump
Location: La Grange, GA
Central Casting is now taking submissions for BABIES! 

Looking for 2 month old and 5 month old babies specifically. MUST HAVE DARK HAIR- having blue eyes as well is a bonus. Must be able to portray caucasian.

Baby must either be 2 months old OR 5 months old, or extremely close to it. 
If this is your baby, please submit the following:
• Clear recent full-body photo & head shot
• DOB of your baby
• Clothing sizes
• Full name of guardian & child
• Phone Number (formatted 000-000-0000)

Send submissions to:
pilot@centralcasting.com
Subject Line: BABY

items.text:
🎬 CALLING ALL CREATIVES– FULL CREW WANTED (LOS ANGELES) 🎬  

We’re assembling a passionate, driven team to bring a full-length feature film to life — and we’re looking for creatives who want to build something meaningful from the ground up.

📍 Location: Los Angeles (on-location shoots)  
🗓 Shoot Dates: May 10 – June 10  

Logline:

A man who built his life on control must lose everything before he can learn how to truly live.  

We are currently looking to fill the following positions 

- Executive producer

Directing department 

- 1st AD
- 2nd AD
- Script supervisor 

Lighting Department 

- Gaffer
- Lighting technician 

Sound Department 

- Sound Mixer
- Boom operator 

Production department 

- Art director 
- Costume designer 
- Make up artist 
- Hair stylist 
- Production (on location) manager
- Assistant Production manager 

Visuals

- Graphic designer/VFX artist 

This is a no-budget, passion-driven project, but we’re creating a professional, collaborative environment with a team that’s serious about storytelling and execution. Meals and transportation will be provided at no cost to crew and supplied daily. 

  What you’ll get:
• A chance to be part of a full feature film production  
• Hands-on experience and real set collaboration  
• Networking with a dedicated creative team  
• Meals provided daily (on us) 🍽  
• Transportation covered (on us) 🚐  
• A project you can truly put your name on and be proud of

🎥 This is for filmmakers who are hungry to create, grow, and be part of something bigger than just another short or side project. We’re building a team that shows up, collaborates, and pushes each other to make something great. We only admire bringing your good vibes on set and creating a positive and free creative environment for everybody, then we’ll be more than willing to have you on board.

If you’re interested, please fill out this form  below or reach out via email disconnectedmovie2026@gmail.com

https://docs.google.com/forms/d/1bFADoV10oTGB2Qb4AdMHoWRFVmvkHLb-ixG6mHlW758/edit?ts=69c471bf

Let’s make something special. 🚀

items.text:
Hi, all.
My names Safiya I’m a third year student studying journalism but I also do acting. For my course I’m doing a short form podcast titled the “reality of pursuing acting”.

This would be questions related conversations on what it’s like to pursue acting from different perspectives.
 
Im looking to speak to:
1.) A actor who has or is in acting/drama school
2.)A actor who hasn’t been to acting school but is pursuing acting 
3.) A drama, acting or theatre coach/teacher 
4.) Casting director

Anyone can get in touch via facebook messenger or my email Safiya.warrior@hotmail.co.uk

I can send you more details on what this entails but that is the general bases.

Thank you!

items.text:
Casting Call!!!

“Two pairs of Legs, Lennon and Lindsey embrace the challenging journey to explore if their continuous encounters really are just coincidences.”

Hello!  That was the logline of my short film which I’m currently directing called Legs! I am a student studying Film Practice at University Of the Arts London. 

Legs is a comedy based around a pair of Legs! Set in present day London we explore the nature of the invisible string theory. The film has heavy inspiration from Wes Anderson, LaLaLand, and the silent era. 

We are currently seeking two male dancers to take upon the role of Lennon (the main lead) and the ex-partner of the female lead (the antagonist). 

Legs is a dialogue free film due to its heavy inspiration from the silent era. Due to this these roles require actors to move very expressively with their legs, as the legs are the entire character's personality, emotions, and identity.

We will be shooting the film from the 23rd to the 30th of April. So, we ask to keep those days as available if you are interested. 

We are also seeking 2 voice actors, the male and female lead which will be crucial to communicate the emotions via non-verbal vocalisations. 

We will be recording voice acting the week after shooting.

If interested in more than just acting or just voice acting feel free to apply for both positions!

Most locations will be shot in the London borough of Southwark and food and travel will be covered. However, we have a very limited budget, so we are not able to pay any actors beyond that.  

But this will be a great opportunity to expand your portfolio, and work on a production where you will get to challenge yourself with something potentially new to you!

If you are interested contact me via this post or email my producer :

I.pugh0320251@arts.ac.uk

Instagram: @iolopzs

media.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'theundomesticgoddess15 > SwimmingThreads Today Teddy said that he needs new goggles bc his current ones have a hole in the gasket and they leak. It's happened. A pair of goggles has worn out instead of being lost. And I reached into my trusty supply of extra goggles, pulled out the brand he prefers and gave them to him. This is what I've been training, ie buying extra goggles, for. GIF'

message.text: I am casting 2 PSA’s and Seeking Non-Union Actors with Acting Resumes to portray the following types:PSA #1:Elderly Man (75–85 open ethnicity) - Rate: $500Pharmacist (Male, 25–26 open ethnicity) - Rate: $500* Doctor (Black, 40’s any gender) - Rate: $300* Customer (Asian any gender, around 40) - Rate: $300* Worker (Female, open Ethnicity around 30) - Rate: $300PSA  #2: Elderly Woman (75–85): Rate: $500Mother (40): Middle Eastern or Latina preferred - Rate: $500Father (around 45): White - Rate: $500Teenage Boy (15): White - Rate: $500Woman (50): White - Rate: $500Man (around 50): White - Rate: $500Young Black Woman (20’s) - Rate: $500Black Man (around 30) - Rate: $500Middle-aged Asian Man - Rate: $500If you fit the bill please send an email to:JodiPurdyCasting@gmail.comSubj:  PSA - List RoleIncludeName, Cell, Email, Location, Photos, Resume, Reel (If available), VideosI will reply to emails with further instructions!These are paid roles.Filming in Greater BostonOne Day Between 4/3 & 4/7YOU MUST SUBMIT PER INSTRUCTIONS TO BE CONSIDERED.  COMMENTING ON POSTS IS NOT SUBMITTING #casting #commercial #$500 #$300 #principal #extra #jodipurdycasting

COMMENTING ON POSTS IS NOT SUBMITTING #casting #commercial #$500 #$300 #principal #extra #jodipurdycasting

items.text:
Casting Call - Student Short Film
Hi everyone! 

I’m casting for a Brunel University student short film titled Echoes of Time - a warm, emotional drama about a university student reconnecting with childhood memories during a difficult time. 

📍Location: Uxbridge, London

🗓️Shoot dates: 20, 22, 24 April 2026

❕Unpaid (student production), but travel expenses will be covered. 

✨Great opportunity for actors looking to collaborate on a meaningful, visually driven student project. 

If you have any questions, feel free to message me!

items.text:
One For The Road CASTING CALL OPENED UP for “DAVE” SHOOTING DATES: 30th of April, 1st, 3rd of May 2026. Shooting in Holbeck, LEEDS. 

Dave and Rob have been best-friends for thirty years but when their favourite pub is due to close by the end of the night the pair fall out and twenty-two year old shop-lifter Jamie has to repair their friendship before the last bell.

 ‘One For The Road’ dives into masculinity, British identity, and the quiet weight of everyday working-class hardships. DAVE (40-60s) is a miserable, yorkshire man who has a very fatherly feel to him. 

If you’d like to apply please contact me privately or on instagram @georgiekayfilm

items.text:
Casting Call!!! 

Currently casting for a new TV show. Below are the requirements, if you know anyone who fits the bill, please get in touch ASAP!!! Drop me a DM!! 

✅ 18 - 24 year old white males
✅ Ideally from London
✅ Authentic London Accent 
✅ Ideally a free agent 
✅ Experience a bonus but not essential 
✅ Available to shoot from end of May

It is paid! Happy to explain more deets over a call!

topComments.text: Not sure if this was posted and only just accepted but, I know quite a few guys have sent out a message and taped as it needed to be cast asap, said they’d hear something back but haven’t. If you haven’t found the right person yet that’s fine but from an actors point - it’s always nice to hear back even if it’s a no

items.text:
𝗖𝗮𝘀𝘁𝗶𝗻𝗴 𝗖𝗮𝗹𝗹: 𝗧𝗵𝗲 𝗠𝗶𝗹𝗹𝗲𝗻𝗻𝗶𝗮𝗹
𝗣𝗿𝗼𝗷𝗲𝗰𝘁 𝗧𝘆𝗽𝗲: Short Film / Proof of Concept (Non-union)

𝗗𝗲𝘀𝗰𝗿𝗶𝗽𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻

This is a brief proof of concept (under 5 minutes) for a complete short film currently in development. The project is a cinematic reconstruction of a true story. We are producing this self-contained excerpt to establish the visual style, tone, and narrative direction of the larger film.

𝗟𝗼𝗴𝗹𝗶𝗻𝗲

A psychological drama about the story of an immigrant who finds himself facing a choice in a difficult life situation: to continue working hard at the port or to finally realize and follow his dream.

𝗣𝗿𝗼𝗱𝘂𝗰𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻 𝗗𝗲𝘁𝗮𝗶𝗹𝘀

𝗣𝗿𝗼𝗱𝘂𝗰𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻: OFF MIRROR Studio

𝗗𝗶𝗿𝗲𝗰𝘁𝗼𝗿: V. Chase Malukha

𝗣𝗿𝗼𝗱𝘂𝗰𝗲𝗿: Maryna Malukha

𝗦𝗵𝗼𝗼𝘁 𝗗𝗮𝘁𝗲𝘀: 1-2 days, March 27 or March 28

𝗟𝗼𝗰𝗮𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻: Vancouver

𝗥𝗮𝘁𝗲 𝗼𝗳 𝗣𝗮𝘆: Volunteer. Meals, copy for reel, and credit provided.

𝗥𝗢𝗟𝗘:

𝗟𝗘𝗔𝗗 – Male, 25-40

𝗖𝗵𝗮𝗿𝗮𝗰𝘁𝗲𝗿 𝗕𝗿𝗲𝗮𝗸𝗱𝗼𝘄𝗻:

• 𝗣𝗿𝗲𝘀𝗲𝗻𝗰𝗲 / 𝗚𝗮𝘇𝗲: We are looking for depth and intelligence. The actor must be able to "hold the frame in silence," allowing the audience to read his internal monologue.

• 𝗠𝗶𝗰𝗿𝗼-𝗲𝘅𝗽𝗿𝗲𝘀𝘀𝗶𝗼𝗻𝘀: The ability to convey quiet panic, disorientation, and intense internal struggle without overacting.

• 𝗧𝗿𝗮𝗻𝘀𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗺𝗮𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻: The ability to organically transition from a state of complete powerlessness and despair to a sudden epiphany and newfound grounding.

𝗩𝗶𝘀𝘂𝗮𝗹 𝗖𝗼𝗻𝘁𝗲𝘅𝘁:

Urban noir aesthetic. Isolation in a crowd, the cold light of a metropolis, the intimacy of an epiphany. This is highly internalized acting (working "under the skin").

𝗦𝗨𝗕𝗠𝗜𝗦𝗦𝗜𝗢𝗡 & 𝗦𝗘𝗟𝗙-𝗧𝗔𝗣𝗘 𝗜𝗡𝗦𝗧𝗥𝗨𝗖𝗧𝗜𝗢𝗡𝗦:

Please submit your Headshot, Resume/Profile link, and Self-Tape to: maryna@offmirror.studio

𝗦𝘂𝗯𝗷𝗲𝗰𝘁 𝗟𝗶𝗻𝗲: THE MILLENNIAL - your name

• 𝗦𝗲𝗹𝗳-𝗧𝗮𝗽𝗲 𝗜𝗻𝘀𝘁𝗿𝘂𝗰𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻𝘀: Prepare a silent scene (up to 2 minutes). Theatricality and overacting are strictly discouraged.

• 𝗦𝘂𝗯𝗺𝗶𝘀𝘀𝗶𝗼𝗻 𝗗𝗲𝗮𝗱𝗹𝗶𝗻𝗲: March 25, 11:59 PM. (We are casting on a tight turnaround).
items.summary:
𝗖𝗮𝘀𝘁𝗶𝗻𝗴 𝗖𝗮𝗹𝗹: 𝗧𝗵𝗲 𝗠𝗶𝗹𝗹𝗲𝗻𝗻𝗶𝗮𝗹
𝗣𝗿𝗼𝗷𝗲𝗰𝘁 𝗧𝘆𝗽𝗲: Short Film / Proof of Concept (Non-union)

𝗗𝗲𝘀𝗰𝗿𝗶𝗽𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻

This is a brief proof of concept (under 5 minutes) for a complete short film currently in development. The project is a cinematic reconstruction of a true story. We are producing this self-contained excerpt to establish the visual style, tone, and narrative direction of the larger film.

𝗟𝗼𝗴𝗹𝗶𝗻𝗲

A psychological drama about the story of an immigrant who finds himself facing a choice in a difficult life situation: to continue working hard at the port or to finally realize and follow his dream.

𝗣𝗿𝗼𝗱𝘂𝗰𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻 𝗗𝗲𝘁𝗮𝗶𝗹𝘀

𝗣𝗿𝗼𝗱𝘂𝗰𝗲𝗿: Maryna Malukha

𝗦𝗵𝗼𝗼𝘁 𝗗𝗮𝘁𝗲𝘀: 1-2 days, March 27 or March 28

𝗟𝗼𝗰𝗮𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻: Vancouver

𝗥𝗮𝘁𝗲 𝗼𝗳 𝗣𝗮𝘆: Volunteer. Meals, copy for reel, and credit provided.

• 𝗧𝗿𝗮𝗻𝘀𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗺𝗮𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻: The ability to organically transition from a state of complete powerlessness and despair to a sudden epiphany and newfound grounding.

CASTING MUSICAL THEATRE ACTORS for a short film!

Seeking performers for a 4-minute, campy musical number! Must be comfortable singing on camera. All genders, 18+, lgbtq+ encouraged! 

Send reels + resume to arianaroachfilm@gmail.com by April 3!

attachments.ocrText: May be a graphic of text that says 'the bite caTpy whodunnit set Theatrical and absurd. May 2026 (possible rehearsal(s) prior) ABOUT minutes) •Ages 18+, genders Location: Vancouver Seeking performers with strong musical theatre backgrounds bold, contrasting characters. Some roles are featured soloists are key ensemble with featured moments. Must be comfortable singing on camera (live pre-recorded, TBD) and taking direction quickly. Dance ability and improv are plus. play others This filmmaking competition, so the weekend will be intense. We're looking for performers who thrive under pressure. Please send demo and reel resume Selected applicants will invited (date with director, Submissions group audition and choreographer.'

Wow💥😮 I’m truly amazed by the strength and grace of Shen Yun’s male dancers — their legs and arms are pure power in motion!
🎟️ Visit https://1kb.link/qAjwxM for theater info and tickets! 

⚡️ Don’t miss the chance to witness this magical and mesmerizing live experience.

items.text:
We are an Independent production company looking to establish ourselves with our filmmaking debut & we are looking for our leading lady to join our team!

         The character has a business mindset with greedy intentions that has a unique fashion sense. It's important to us that you're comfortable with our wardrobe requests...Our vision for the character is she wears a variety of outfits in a leather jacket & cozy sweaters with leather pants, & long boots preferably flat not heel.

Short film (Around 40 min.)
Film will be entered in film festivals. 
Pay: $1,000 + IMDb credit 
*If you're interested, send a headshot,  link to your IMDb page (if you have one), & link to your Instagram to this email: deowainstaproductions@gmail.com 

We will send a follow-up email with a short slide (scene) for you to make an audition tape for us. 

We will appreciate it if you go support our Instagram & YouTube channel! Upon doing so we will keep you in mind for opportunities in our future film projects!

https://www.instagram.com/deowainsta_productions?igsh=MTNoM3JzaGl2bjZ6OQ==

https://youtube.com/@deowainstaproductions?si=sJs83boxoJO_7oTA

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'Casting Call Female lead, age 21-35 Native American, Latina, or Asian 4 days of filming in upstate N.Y. (Adirondack region) lodging & meals/ catering will be provided *You are responsible for travel expenses if coming from out of state You will be paid a flat rate Must be comfortable doing scenes outdoors in the cold & walking along a snow covered trail in a forest setting. The film is a psychological thriller based on Native American folklore'

items.text:
CASTING CALL - Student Film
Hi!! We are looking for two actors for a student film shot in Prague. The film is in English, and the crew is English speaking. 

General storyline: a couple is cooking for dinner, but they are missing the main ingredient. As they bicker back and forth, they discover their lack of trust in one another. 

Sarah — A female actress, 22-25, to play a caring and detailed-oriented young lady. 

Tom — A male actor,  22-25, to play a calm and sympathetic young man. 

Both should be comfortable with some physicality (kiss on the cheek, hug etc.). A fluent level of English is required. 

We are open to casting not only individuals but also a couple!

Shoot dates: April 15-19

As we are a no budget student film, we do not have the option to give compensation. However, food and beverages will be provided!!

If you’re interested and available, please send an email to barunka.vas@gmail.com or DM me with a picture and a short introduction of you (+ your past experience if applicable) 💗

Are you a dancer who can learn steps quickly? VIN MORREALE CASTING needs experienced Male Dancers - 18 years or older, all ethnicities - who can quickly learn a choreographed dance routine on March 30th and perform it on camera the following day.  These will be background roles in a fun scene in a movie with two name Hollywood stars starting next week. Rate is $100 per day for March 30th & 31st. 

SEEKING: 
MALE DANCERS - 18 and over, All Ethnicities. Able to learn steps rapidly. 

If you have serious dance experience and are available 3/30 & 3/31, email VIN@ACADEMYARTS.COM with the following:

NAME
AGE 
HEIGHT
PHONE
EMAIL
UNION or NON-UNION
AGENT - If you have one

And include a recent PHOTO and a selfie video link of you dancing, any style. AND/OR attach a resume with any dance experience/training listed. 

Put MALE DANCER in the subject line of your email and send to VIN@ACADEMYARTS.COM asap.

items.text:
Casting Call! Paid, 1/2 Day Shoot.
Hello! We are working with a non-profit on a short film about racial inequity. The film calls for 4-6 actors/actresses of Native American descent.

These roles are background extra positions to play the lead actor's family.

$50 day rate for the 3 hour shoot in Denver. We are eyeing to film early to mid-April!

Please send an email to kodocasting@gmail.com with your headshot and any applicable materials! Thank you!

items.text:
Hello! I’m looking for an actor for my Prod 1 short and need a trans masculine actor (early into medical transition) to play the part of a closeted trans boy being accidentally outed to his mom, by his school counselor. 

The character, Luke, is suppose to be around 15/16, but I’m looking for someone 18-23 to play the part. Shooting days will be April 11th and 12th, unpaid but food is provided, as well as a copy of the finished short once it’s done. 

You’re welcome to comment, private message me on here, or email me, if you’re interested or have questions. 
dominic.dhorton99@gmail.com

items.text:
The next installment in the My Horrible Roommate Winnie The Pooh series!
My Horrible Lover Winnie The Pooh is the next installment within the series. This will be a short film, rather then a full on feature length film like the last two. This is meant to be somewhat of a filler while also contributing to the ongoing story.

I am looking for a female to play the lover of Pooh. 

Character Description: a women who also has a thing for killing. She has a bad girl attitude, but also has a sweet spot for Pooh.

Age Range, 21 and up.

Location, Fort Collins 

Compensation: None

This will be premiering on YouTube along with the rest of the films. Please send me a message for more info!!

I am also looking for extras to be apart of the kill count as well!!

items.text:
A bold new upcoming British South Asian Series Show is currently in development for major Streaming Platforms and entering it's casting phase. This project is a raw, hard-hitting drama thriller with elements of humour, exploring narratives based from real life society within the Desi British community. Drawing inspiration from titles such as Man Like Mobeen, Mogul Mowgli, Ill Manors, Bend It Like Beckham, Blinded By The Lights, Daytimers, Everywhere & Nowhere & Virdee. The series aims to authentically portray the urban underworld of British South Asian pop culture. 

🎭 ABOUT THE PROJECT
The story centres young people from South Asian backgrounds living in the UK, and international students navigating life in Britain/Europe. 

This is a multi-layered narrative covering: 

- Identity & belonging
- Family dynamics & generational conflict
- Love, relationships & marriage
- Crime & survival in urban environments
- Cultural expectations & taboo subjects
- Personal ambition and redefining success 

Each character will have a deep backstory, with storylines unfolding across drama, suspense, humour, and realism.
The project has already been seen successfully as a Theatre Stage Play production tester and is currently being developed for an on-screen series, with potential partnerships across major streaming platforms such as Netflix UK, BBC Films, BFI Film Council, Channel 4, ITV X Studios, Film Four, HBO Max, Hulu, Mubi, Amazon Prime Video, Apple TV+, Facebook Watch, Sky Studios, Plex, Paramount Pictures Plus, Pluto TV, Now TV, Channel Five, Peacock, Eros Now and B4U Motion Pictures Studios. 

🎬 WHO WE ARE CASTING 

We are seeking British South Asian (Desi) Talents: 

Must be UK born or raised within the UK with Strong understanding of British South Asian culture, including Social issues & taboo topics, music, arts, entertainment and Community dynamics with lived experiences. 

Age Range: 

Open to all age groups
Experienced and None-Experienced 

All Genders Can Apply

📍 LOCATION 

Auditions, rehearsals, and filming will take place in London. Rehearsals held at a North London studio base. Some filming may occur in other UK locations depending on production needs. 

🎥 PRODUCTION DETAILS 

Project currently in development, writing, and script editing stage. Selected applicants will take part in:
Rehearsals, Character development, Minor Stunt coordination (If Required) 

Refreshments and facilities will be provided during rehearsals and production. 

💼 COMPENSATION 

This production forms part of a strategic development plan toward a full television adaptation. Compensation terms are structured as follows: 

Engagement at this stage is based on development participation agreements
upon successful transition into full production, formal contracts will be issued
with fees which align with industry standard rates (FAA/Union-Equivalent structures where applicable). Final compensation, including percentage participation and fees, will be determined by the financing team once full production budgets are in place. All financial terms will be clearly outlined and contractually agreed prior to principal. 

⚠️ IMPORTANT – READ BEFORE APPLYING 

We are casting for Serious, Committed, and Professional applicants Only. 

❌ NO time-wasters. Applications will be removed if this information is ignored.
❗ Read all information carefully before applying. If you dismiss this instruction, your application will be automatically Deleted. 

✅ Only apply if you are:
Fully Committed and Flexible with availability. Ready to engage. Applicants who demonstrate professionalism and attention to detail will be prioritised for casting interviews. 

🚀 WHAT WE OFFER 

Opportunity to be part of a groundbreaking British South Asian series with Character development and performance training. Support in personal Branding/Growth and marketing
Collaboration. Whether you are represented by an agent or independent, you are welcome to apply provided you are contractually available. 

📩 NEXT STEP 

Shortlisted applicants will be invited to a Casting Interview Screening where full character breakdowns and project direction will be discussed in detail. Confirmed applicants will be called in for a Test Shoot later on in the season. 

Ideally we are Casting London based talents. Although if you are not from London and want to get involved, you are welcome to if you are open to travelling. Although this will be Your responsibility if you are able to reach call times as scheduled. 

To Apply, simply Facebook Inbox or E-Mail your Portfolio, Credentials if you own any with your Contact Info. Do Not apply if you cannot provide any form of contact details. Mention your Availability of the best Time/Date when to reach out to you. 

E-Mail: Ahmedsy_jaber@hotmail.com

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'CASTING CALL BRITISH SOUTH ASIAN t DRAMA SERIES NOW IN DEVELOPMENT RAW, GRITTY, URBAN DRAMA-THRILLER DRAMA- PLORING LIFE THE BRITISH SOUTH ASIAN COMMUNITY WHO WE'RE LOOKING FOR: BRITISH SOUTH ASIAN (DESI) TALENT UK BORN RAISED AGES 8+ EXPERIENCED OR NEW ACTORS AUDITIONS FILMING LOCATIONS LONDON OTHER REHEARSALSI NORTH LONDON COMPENSATION •INDUSTRY STANDARD RATES CONTRACTS SSUED UPOM FUL FULL PRODUCTION CTION DRAMA CRIME CULTURE TABOO READ CAREFULLY• SERIOUSAPPLICANTSO SERIOUS PPLICANTS ONLY TRAINING CHARACTER DEVELOPMENT MAJOR STREAMING TV NETWORKS'

items.text: I’m forming a community of character walking tour guides. Guides will run themed tours in Central London. I work as an agent/representative. Guides work independently, as freelancers. Guides pay a monthly membership fee, this gives each guide representation and promotion on my website and a profile page and individual booking page. Guides also receive promotional material ( business cards & QR codes ) but guides are encourage to self promote. The tours are run  on a ‘pay what you like ‘ basis. This means that the customer tips the guide at the end of the tour. The guide keeps 100% of their tips. I’m casting a fully inclusive ensemble of Cockney characters, inspired by figures from old London history and favourite musical theatre characters. Guides will be welcoming, friendly personalities, costumed characters giving historical and cultural insights and telling stories from a unique perspective. I’m holding informal interviews in Mid April.

topComments.text: Steve Dent, Mark Atkinson, Devils Horsemen, The Centre of Horseback Combat  👏 Worth following them all but you'd need to be older for riding work but if you can get in as groom etc you'd stand a chance but it's very very competitive

items.summary: Hi everyone, im maisey im 14 years old. I'm looking into stunt riding for movies ect . I've been riding for 5 nearly 6 years and have tried a variety of disciplines in the equine world ranging from trick riding to horseback archery to even classical riding and so much more ! I'm very committed to what I do and always put 100% into whatever im put at .

items.title: Let's welcome our new members!

items.text: As many of you know, I perpetually advocate for the best for artists. I have the incredible opportunity to present the 2B A Rising Star organization, and mentor talent on the first online platform where remarkable creatives get the chance to be paid monthly. We spend so much $$$ in this industry, that it just makes sense to have the visibility, validation, and recognition. Bring your tribe. Allow me to support your journey. Promo code: 2BKimberly1 #2BARS Upload. Vote. Win.

items.summary: As many of you know, I perpetually advocate for the best for artists. I have the incredible opportunity to present the 2B A Rising Star organization, and mentor talent on the first online platform where remarkable creatives get the chance to be paid monthly. We spend so much $$$ in this industry, that it just makes sense to have the visibility, validation, and recognition. Bring your tribe. Allow me to support your journey. Promo code: 2BKimberly1 #2BARS Upload. Vote. Win.

sharedPost.text:
Closeness and boundaries are not just mental decisions; they are also experienced physically.
​
In 𝗯𝗼𝗱𝘆 𝗽𝘀𝘆𝗰𝗵𝗼𝘁𝗵𝗲𝗿𝗮𝗽𝘆, we use body awareness to help restore these capacities and recognise and change automatic relationship patterns.
​
Healthy relationships begin with reconnecting to your own bodily awareness.
​
In Berlin & Online.
​
→ 𝗟𝗲𝗮𝗿𝗻 𝗺𝗼𝗿𝗲:
https://www.bodymindtherapy.de/en/erstgespraech-stress-emotional-release
.
.
.
#berlintherapy #psychotherapyberlin #somatictherapy #bodypsychotherapy #traumainformedtherapy #mentalhealthberlin #stressreliefberlin #selfregulation #mindbodyconnection #therapyforprofessionals

items.summary: ✨PAID CASTING CALL✨
items.title: ✨PAID CASTING CALL✨

items.text: I’m forming a community of character walking tour guides. Guides will run themed tours in Central London. I work as an agent/representative. Guides work independently, as freelancers. Guides pay a monthly membership fee, this gives each guide representation and promotion on my website and a profile page and individual booking page. Guides also receive promotional material ( business cards & QR codes ) but guides are encourage to self promote. The tours are run  on a ‘pay what you like ‘ basis. This means that the customer tips the guide at the end of the tour. The guide keeps 100% of their tips. I’m casting a fully inclusive ensemble of Cockney characters, inspired by figures from old London history and favourite musical theatre characters. Guides will be welcoming, friendly personalities, costumed characters giving historical and cultural insights and telling stories from a unique perspective. I’m holding informal interviews in Mid April.

items.summary: I’m forming a community of character walking tour guides. Guides will run themed tours in Central London. I work as an agent/representative. Guides work independently, as freelancers. Guides pay a monthly membership fee, this gives each guide representation and promotion on my website and a profile page and individual booking page. Guides also receive promotional material ( business cards & QR codes ) but guides are encourage to self promote. The tours are run  on a ‘pay what you like ‘ basis. This means that the customer tips the guide at the end of the tour. The guide keeps 100% of their tips. I’m casting a fully inclusive ensemble of Cockney characters, inspired by figures from old London history and favourite musical theatre characters. Guides will be welcoming, friendly personalities, costumed characters giving historical and cultural insights and telling stories from a unique perspective. I’m holding informal interviews in Mid April.
items.title: I’m forming a community of character walking tour guides. Guides will run themed tours in Central London. I work as an agent/representative. Guides work independently, as freelancers. Guides pay a monthly membership fee, this gives each guide representation and promotion on my website and a profile page and individual booking page. Guides also receive promotional material ( business cards & QR codes ) but guides are encourage to self promote. The tours are run  on a ‘pay what you like ‘ basis. This means that the customer tips the guide at the end of the tour. The guide keeps 100% of their tips. I’m casting a fully inclusive ensemble of Cockney characters, inspired by figures from old London history and favourite musical theatre characters. Guides will be welcoming, friendly personalities, costumed characters giving historical and cultural insights and telling stories from a unique perspective. I’m holding informal interviews in Mid April.

sharedPost.text:
De PDG à Canal+ : Le parcours de Sébastien FAVETTE (Comédien)
Bonjour à tous ! Je suis Sébastien Favette, comédien basé à Lyon et mobile à l'international.
​Dans cette vidéo de présentation format "Konbini", je vous partage mon parcours atypique : de la direction d'entreprise aux plateaux de tournage.
​🎬 ACTUALITÉ : Retrouvez-moi dans le rôle de Pascal Retelet dans la série "Fake You" sur Canal+, réalisée par Laurent Jaoui (Avant-première au Grand Rex).
​CE QUE JE PROPOSE :
​Un vécu réel (Ex-PDG, gestion de crise, père solo).
​Une technique de jeu rigoureuse et organique.
​Trilingue : Français, Allemand, Anglais.
​Spécialisé dans les rôles à relief (Autorité, Faille, Résilience).
​🔍 ME CONTACTER / EN SAVOIR PLUS :
Tapez "Sébastien Favette" sur Google pour découvrir mon parcours complet, mes bandes-démos et mes actus.
📧 Contact pro : singledalt69@gmail.com 
📸 Instagram : @sebastienfavetteofficial 
​#Comédien #Casting #CanalPlus #SébastienFavette #ActeurLyon Cinéma

items.text:
**We are still looking for two performers. Required at two locations: Lynn Valley (North Vancouver) and Tsawwassen.**

**Job Overview**

Two days @ Tsawwassen: April 3rd and April 4th 12:30pm - 5:30pm

One day @ North Van: April 4th 11:30am - 4pm

Pay $30 - 35 per hour (depending on experience)

Join our vibrant team as a Mascot Performer / Actor, where you will bring joy, excitement, and memorable experiences to audiences of all ages! In this lively role, you will embody the beloved Easter Bunny for photo shoots, engage with guests through energetic performances, and create magical moments that leave lasting impressions.

Easter Bunny Costume provided.

Your enthusiasm and creativity will help foster a fun and welcoming environment, making the attraction unforgettable. This paid position offers an exciting opportunity to showcase your acting talents while spreading happiness in a dynamic setting.

**Responsibilities**
* Perform as designated Easter Bunny mascot with lively energy, ensuring authentic and engaging portrayals
* Interact with guests, especially children, through playful gestures, poses, and storytelling to enhance their experience and to capture a precious memory picture
* Participate in costume fitting and tuition to perfect character and movements
* Maintain character integrity throughout performances while adhering to safety guidelines

This role is perfect for energetic performers who love entertaining others and thrive in lively environments. We value creativity, enthusiasm, and a passion for making people smile!

PM me and please forward relevant experience and recent photo.

items.text:
CASTING CALL
THE COLOR I NEVER WORE-

SYNOPSIS

This independent drama explores the nuanced experiences and stories of minorities. 

We aim to capture authentic emotions and tell a story that resonates with the diverse community in Vancouver.

SEEKING THE FOLLOWING ROLES

1. (Female, 60s+):

Ethnicity: East Asian

Description: A character with deep life experience. 

Must be able to convey subtle emotions through facial expressions and presence.

2. (Male, 60s+):

Ethnicity: East Asian

Description: A character who carries the weight of their history. 

Seeking an actor who can express strength and vulnerability through quiet moments.

COMPENSATION & BENEFITS

Credit: Screen credit provided (IMDb eligible).

Meals: Full catering provided on set (Lunch & Dinner).

Portfolio: High-quality footage for your acting reel and portfolio.

PayRoll : $200 per day (Flat Fee)

SUBMISSION PROCESS

Phase 1 (Self-Tape): Please submit a 1-2 Minute Self-Tape Video focusing on facial acting and expressions (Close-up).

Phase 2 (Interview): Successful applicants will be invited for a person-to-person interview and an on-site acting audition.

DEADLINE: March 31, 2026

HOW TO APPLY: atharv.maakaamal@gmail.com

Please include your headshot, resume, and the self-tape video.

items.text:
🎉 WE’RE HIRING PARTY HOSTS 🎉
This is what working at Starkidz actually looks like… 💖
Fun, energy, laughter and making magical memories for children ✨

Based in SOUTHPORT ✨

If you love working with kids and can bring the energy to a party… we want you!

We’re looking for:
💫 Confident, fun, outgoing people
💫 Happy to be silly & get involved
💫 Great with children
💫 Available weekends (this is a must!)
💫 Able to travel to party locations (driving is a bonus 🚗)

It’s not just a job… it’s dancing, games, costumes, chaos (the fun kind 😂) and being part of a team that genuinely loves what they do 💖

📩 TO APPLY:
Send us an email with:
 • Your name & age
 • A little bit about yourself
 • Any experience (don’t worry if you don’t have loads!)
 • Why you’d love to join the Starkidz team

📧 info@starkidzparty.co.uk

Tag someone who would be PERFECT for this 👇✨

Hej!

Chorzów/Zabrze/Katowice/Oświęcim 

Szukamy 2–3 kobiet w wieku 27–30 lat do udziału w materiałach reklamowych dla sklepu z bielizną.

Zależy nam przede wszystkim na naturalnym pokazaniu naszej grupy docelowej – kobiecości, stylu i codziennych sytuacji. Udział nie wymaga pełnego występowania w bieliźnie – stawiamy na subtelność i estetykę.

Idealna szansa na zbudowanie portfolio ze względu na występ popularnych twarzy 

**Oferujemy:**

– udział w projekcie reklamowym - można użyć do swojego portfolio 

– dowolny zestaw bielizny do wyboru

Jeśli jesteś zainteresowana lub chcesz dowiedzieć się więcej – napisz wiadomość prywatną lub zostaw komentarz

items.text:
Darmowa sesja.Jestem początkującym fotografem szukam do powiększenia portfolio
Nie trzeba umieć pozować, żeby pięknie wyglądać na zdjęciach.

Wystarczy dobre prowadzenie.

Ta sesja powstała z myślą o kobietach, które:

✔ nigdy nie były na profesjonalnej sesji

✔ myślą „nie jestem fotogeniczna”

✔ stresują się aparatem

✔ chcą spróbować bez presji i oceniania

✔ marzą o zdjęciach, w których zobaczą siebie inaczej

✔ zezwalają na publikację zdjęć w internecie (tylko wybrane ujęcia)

Efekt?

👉 Więcej pewności siebie

👉 Poczucie bycia zauważoną

👉 Zdjęcia, które są o Tobie — nie o pozowaniu

📅 Ilość miejsc ograniczona

👉 Napisz „SESJA KOBIECA” tylko W WIADOMOSCI PRYWATNEJ

Sesja w twoim domu lub w plenerze ❗❗

items.text:
POSZUKIWANI STAND-IN DO MIĘDZYNARODOWEJ PRODUKCJI
Poszukujemy osób, które wcielą się w rolę stand-in dla zagranicznych ambasadorów marki

🎯Kogo szukamy?

Osób, które są zbliżone wymiarami

👉są gotowe nauczyć się kilku zdań w danym języku (lub powiedzieć je fonetycznie)

👉mile widziane osoby, które już posługują się jednym z języków

💸Wysokie Stawki!!

🎥Terminy zdjęć i języki:

🔵 RALF (jęz. NIEMIECKI)

Dni zdjęciowe 7.04, 8.04, 9.04

WZROST: 168 / krótkie włosy / WYMIARY: KL. PIERSIOWA: 98 / PAS: 88, BIODRA: 99, BUT: 38/38

🔵 VINCENT (jęz. FRANCUSKI)

Dni zdjęciowe 10.04, 11.04

WZROST: 168 - Krótkie włosy

🔵 FRANK (jęz. WŁOSKI)

Dni zdjęciowe  12.04, 13.04, 14.04

WZROST: 186 - Krótkie włosy

SIZE: XL , SHOES: 44

🔵 CARLOS (jęz. HISZPAŃSKI)

Dni zdjęciowe 15.04, 16.04, 17.04

KRÓTKIE WŁOSY / WZROST: 172

SIZE: XL , SHOES 42

💌Zgłoszenia:

Prosimy o przesyłanie zgłoszeń poprzez maila:

Ludzie@unagimedia.pl

TYTUŁ: stand -in + nazwa postaci

items.text:
‼️ WARSZAWA KWIECIEŃ ‼️
RUSZAMY Z KOLEJNYM, TRZECIM SEZONEM, KULTOWEGO SERIALU, KTÓREGO AKCJA DZIEJE SIE W LATACH 40. 

W związku z powyższym, poszukujemy:

▪️ 8.04 MĘŻCZYZN jako ŻOŁNIERZY (wzrost ok 176-184 szczupli, sprawni fizycznie)

▪️ 8.04 MĘŻCZYZN jako TECHNIKÓW W LABORATORIUM (można być również w dniu 9.04, nie jest to kontynuacja) 

▪️ 9.04 MĘŻCZYZN jako TECHNIKÓW W LABORATORIUM

▪️ 9.04 MĘŻCZYZN jako STRAŻNIKÓW (wzrost ok 176-184 szczupli)

Gramy lata 40, w związku z czym od Panów mundurowych wymaga się ogolenia na gładko. 

Stawka w zależności od godzin na planie 110-130zł gotówką po planie. 

Zgłoszenia wraz z imieniem i nazwiskiem, numerem telefonu, AKTUALNYMI zdjęciami- SYLWETKA, TWARZ PRZÓD I BOK, WZROST oraz ROZMIAR ODZIEŻY przyjmujemy na adres: KAROLINA@ONSETAGENCY.PL w tytule wpisując „SERIAL”.

sharedPost.text:
Angela Boehm Casting is looking for an ADDITIONAL CHILD ROLE for a Healthcare Commercial that will be filming in the NE Ohio area the week of April 13th, 2026.

*If you’ve already auditioned, no need to resubmit - we already have your audition :)*

*Please see below for more details*

DETAILS:

Project: Healthcare Commercial
Usage: Local/regional healthcare
TV, Social and Web
VIDEO Use ONLY - NO Digital Stills or Print use
Filming Location: NE Ohio Area
Shoot Dates: The week of April 13th
Pay Rate: USAGE Plus 1 Shoot Day (Up to 8 hrs Only)
Child (12 + Under) $1250 + 20% A. Fee
1 year buyout and usage fee renewable

Submission & Selections: Video submission. Headshot & full body photo also needed. We do not need to see photos in advance, just include them with the video.

Submission Deadline: Monday, March 30th at 9:00 AM

Roles & Creative Specs:

Slate instructions: Name, Agent (or phone if you’re not with an agent), Age (for minors), Height, and any conflicts with filming dates (note: it is ideal to have none :)). Please state if you are a real family auditioning (as well as state the family member’s names and the role they are auditioning for). No need to state your location, but please note this is a local hire to NE Ohio.

Audition Directions:
Please do not tape outside
Please have a blank background
Please put slates at the end of the audition.
Please keep all videos between 50-100mb!!!

Son, 2-3 (White) - Should be mimicking that of a sick child. Fever. Coughing, cuddling with the parents for comfort. Clearly not feeling well and looking for support from his parents. We get the feeling that he’s an only child. Please do one take and have the child do the action alone. For a second take you can be in the audition to help your child with the action if you’re willing to be in the commercial with him if chosen. Setting-Suburban, single family home. 

*When auditioning - less is MORE!

All submissions must be emailed to angela@angelaboehmcasting.com with subject line "Healthcare Commercial" by Monday, March 30th at 9:00 AM. Please no YouTube links.  Send submissions via WeTransfer or Dropbox.  

Kind regards,
Angela Boehm Casting Team

items.text:
Craxis Studios Casting Call for Indie Film
Title: Despondence

Genre: Coming of Age/Drama

Logline: A sick teenager flees his abusive home in search of freedom, meeting new people as he goes, but as life on the road unravels and the weight of what he left behind begins to close in, he’s forced to confront the truth that some things can’t be outrun.

Production Type: Indie

Production Company: Craxis Studios

Contact information: craxisstudios@gmail.com

Run Time: 45min-1hr

Compensation: While monetary compensation currently isn’t possible, the studio hopes that it can be, as of now Compensation will be in Food and Credits. 

Audition Information: Send an email with headshot, resume, and reel if you have one. 

Filming Location: Denver-Aurora 

Project Description: Despondence is a character-driven short film about grief, memory, and the illusion of escape. It follows a teenager who leaves behind a troubled home in search of something better, only to confront the emotional weight of what he can’t outrun. Despondence also being the start of our studio.

items.text:
Casting a short student film following 24 year old Mikey who becomes consumed by the growing anxiety that he is running out of time. While everyone around him seem to be moving ahead in life. After receiving a watch he believes is bad luck, it's constant ticking reflects his fear and turns his routines into a race he cant escape.

Through the contrast of his carefree best friend. Skylar he begins to question the pressure he puts on himself. When the watch stops, he realises his fear of falling behind was more limiting that time itself.

This is a visually driven, deeply relatable short film exploring the "quarter-life crisis," the weight of modern expectations, and learning how to finally breathe. We are looking for talented, passionate actors to bring this psychological and emotional journey to life.

Please note: As this is a student production, it is an unpaid role. However, it is a fantastic opportunity to collaborate with an ambitious crew in Liverpool

IF YOU HAVE ANY QUESTIONS PLEASE MESSAGE ME OR IF YOU WANT MORE INFORMATION ABOUT THE PROJECT PLEASE CHECK OUR MANDY POST 

[https://www.mandy.com/aa/project/3114924/catching-time/](https://www.mandy.com/aa/project/3114924/catching-time/?fbclid=IwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBEwaUlSaWROY0ZBeDIyUTVxa3NydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR5vTBeyeH0HJxJWJFTDJdlmo_R3DTcg-cnl7hhmjDptX4q9GY1AMBXI88V9MA_aem_UGPIP_GOUGnKLa_xKaBQng)

items.text:
Hi there,

My name is Kieran McKeown, and I'm an actor based in Scotland. I was wondering if anyone knew of any people or companies that deal in fight showreels around the Edinburgh and Glasgow areas. I'm trained in Muay Thai and have been for the last several years, and I wanted to put together a showreel that showcases my skills in a movie/TV style to make it more appealing to casting directors and such. If anyone has any information that would be helpful, please reply to this post or shoot me a dm. Thank you so much for your help and for reading this message!

items.text:
Casting Call!!!

“Two pairs of Legs, Lennon and Lindsey embrace the challenging journey to explore if their continuous encounters really are just coincidences.”

Hello!  That was the logline of my short film which I’m currently directing called Legs! I am a student studying Film Practice at University Of the Arts London. 

Legs is a comedy based around a pair of Legs! Set in present day London we explore the nature of the invisible string theory. The film has heavy inspiration from Wes Anderson, LaLaLand, and the silent era. 

We are currently seeking two male dancers to take upon the role of Lennon (the main lead) and the ex-partner of the female lead (the antagonist). 

Legs is a dialogue free film due to its heavy inspiration from the silent era. Due to this these roles require actors to move very expressively with their legs, as the legs are the entire character's personality, emotions, and identity.

We will be shooting the film from the 23rd to the 30th of April. So, we ask to keep those days as available if you are interested. 

We are also seeking 2 voice actors, the male and female lead which will be crucial to communicate the emotions via non-verbal vocalisations. 

We will be recording voice acting the week after shooting.

If interested in more than just acting or just voice acting feel free to apply for both positions!

Most locations will be shot in the London borough of Southwark and food and travel will be covered. However, we have a very limited budget, so we are not able to pay any actors beyond that.  

But this will be a great opportunity to expand your portfolio, and work on a production where you will get to challenge yourself with something potentially new to you!

If you are interested contact me via this post or email my producer :

I.pugh0320251@arts.ac.uk

Instagram: @iolopzs

items.text:
CASTING CALL: LONDON ONTARIO

Hi everyone, I am a first-year film student at Fanshawe.  I am directing a thriller short film called “Redacted” .We are looking for three main roles: 

**Synopsis**

Dianna Sloan is one of the best; she solves cases faster than anyone. She falls asleep and wakes up the next morning with the answer. When Sergeant Ryder gives her one of the hardest cases regarding a Mob Boss, her dream is what helps her solve it. Dianna Sloan fights to change how the dream ends, so it will not become a reality. The catch is that she is the one who really needs to be caught, to truly solve the case.

**Dianna Sloan **(20s-30s) - Female

A lead badass FBI detective, she will take on any case and is confident she will make it out alive every time, after a supernatural experience the case is seen in a new light.

**Sergeant Ryder **(20s-30s) Male

The FBI sergeant cares about what Dianna gets herself into, but is always there to help her out. Sergeant Ryder is strict about getting the job done, but is still the world’s best boss.

**Mob Boss **(20s-30s) Male

 A powerful man who gets what he wants and is willing to put up a fight. He is the type of person you do not want to mess with.

These are UNPAID roles

We are aiming to shoot over the next two weeks 

If you are interested in one of these roles, you can reach me via Gmail at R3DACTEDFilm@gmail.com

items.text:
**CASTING CALL** - Australian TV Pilot "Next Big Thing". 

TV SHOW | COLLINGWOOD AREA | PAID

**Casting:**

Mateo - Male 21-26 (Must be able to sing)

Charlie - Male 20-25

**Date TBC:**

Mid-May, 3-4 filming days

**Chemistry read / Rehearsal:** 

Seddon

Next Big Thing is about young artists working to turn their passions into a reality. We follow a friend group of singers, actors and filmmakers as they navigate Melbourne’s Creative to try and become the ‘Next Big Thing’

This show will showcase all different kinds of young creatives, singers, actors, dancers, filmmakers and musicians, with musical performances taking place throughout the show to highlight the incredible young talent that Melbourne has to offer.

**If interested**, please email showreel and headshots to: level1203media@gmail.com

Please include your availability in Mid-May

You can also apply through Starnow using this link:

https://www.starnow.com/casting/pilot-project-next-big-thing-aussie-young-adult-tv-show-3126587/

Actors may also be asked to do an in-person audition and/or chemistry read. Shooting will be in the Collingwood area (TBC), in early May, 2026. This is a PAID project!'

items.text:
🚨 AKUT CASTING – vi mangler skuespillere til i morgen! 🚨 Hej alle!
Vi er en gruppe gymnasieelever i 3.G, der er i gang med vores elevproduktion, og desværre er nogle af vores skuespillere sprunget fra i sidste øjeblik – så vi mangler AKUT folk!

🎭 Vi søger 3 roller:

 • Christian – hovedrollens kæreste

 • Rank – Christians ven

 • Vega – hovedrollens veninde

👥 Derudover søger vi også statister!

🎉 Scene: Det er en festscene, så du skal møde op i festtøj. Viben er lidt “Nordsjælland”-miljø.

📍 Location: Hvidovre

📅 Optagedage:

 • 27. marts (i morgen!) kl. 19:00–23:00

 • 2., 3. og 4. april (ikke sikkert alle dage bruges, men sæt gerne tid af)

💸 OBS: Det er en low budget elevproduktion, så der er desværre ikke løn – men til gengæld får du erfaring, optagelser til showreel og en fed oplevelse!

Hvis du har lyst til at være med (eller kender nogen der har!), så skriv hurtigst muligt 🙏

Vi håber virkelig, nogen kan hjælpe med kort varsel – det ville betyde mega meget for os! ❤️

items.text:
🎬 Casting-Aufruf für Kurzfilm – Kinder (10–12 Jahre) 🎬

Für die Produktion eines emotionalen Kurzfilms suche ich Kinder im Alter von ca. 10–12 Jahren, die eine Schulklasse darstellen.

Gesucht werden:

•⁠  ⁠ca. 5–6 Kinder für Haupt-/Nebenrollen (mit mehr Screentime)

•⁠  ⁠weitere Kinder als Komparsen für Klassenszenen

Wichtig für die Besetzung:

Für die Hauptrollen wird ein heller, eher europäischer Typ bevorzugt (z. B. blonde oder hellhaarige Kinder), da dies zum visuellen Konzept des Films passt.  

Mädchen und Jungen sind gleichermaßen willkommen.

Drehdetails:

📍 Raum NRW (Recklinghausen)  

📅 Drehzeitraum: April

🎥 Erfahrung ist kein Muss – Natürlichkeit und Ausstrahlung stehen im Vordergrund  

Vergütung:

Aufwandsentschädigung + Verpflegung am Set

Bewerbung:

Bitte per PN:

•⁠  ⁠Name & Alter des Kindes  

•⁠  ⁠2–3 aktuelle Fotos  

•⁠  ⁠Wohnort  

•⁠  ⁠(optional) kurze Vorstellung / Erfahrung  

Ich freue mich auf eure Nachrichten! 🙌  

Gerne teilen!

items.text:
Albert Santos Gayo: The Entertainer Who Bridges Film, Fashion, and Culture in the UAE

Dubai, United Arab Emirates — Internationally recognized creative personality Albert Santos Gayo continues to captivate audiences in the Middle East as a dynamic entertainer, filmmaker, and image maker whose work spans film, fashion, live events, and cultural productions.

Known for his charismatic stage presence and creative versatility, Gayo has built a reputation in the UAE entertainment scene as a multi-talented performer who seamlessly blends storytelling, fashion direction, and live entertainment. His career has taken him from the world of celebrity hairstyling and show business to directing fashion shows, beauty pageants, and cinematic projects.

Based in Dubai, Gayo has become a familiar figure in entertainment circles, frequently appearing as a host, performer, and creative director for cultural events and international productions. His work reflects a passion for uplifting artists and showcasing multicultural talent in the region.

In addition to his work as an entertainer, Gayo is also recognized as an award-winning filmmaker who continues to develop original film projects, including the short film “Sycamore Beige,” a poetic drama exploring themes of identity, courage, and self-expression. The film is expected to be showcased in upcoming film festivals in the UAE and abroad.

Beyond the stage and camera, Gayo is actively involved in mentoring aspiring models and pageant contestants through grooming, catwalk training, and media coaching. His training programs prepare young talents for international competitions and fashion events, reflecting his dedication to developing the next generation of performers.

As a creative force in entertainment, Gayo continues to collaborate with artists, producers, and cultural organizations to produce events that celebrate creativity and diversity in the UAE.

“Entertainment is not just performance,” Gayo shares. “It is storytelling, inspiration, and the power to bring people together.”

With new projects in film, fashion, and live entertainment on the horizon, Albert Santos Gayo remains one of the most energetic and versatile entertainers contributing to the evolving cultural landscape of Dubai.

Media Contact:
Albert Santos Gayo
📞 +971 50 597 6973
📞 +971 50 544 9182
📧 santosgayoalbert@gmail.com

message.text: I am casting 2 PSA’s and Seeking Non-Union Actors with Acting Resumes to portray the following types:PSA #1:Elderly Man (75–85 open ethnicity) - Rate: $500Pharmacist (Male, 25–26 open ethnicity) - Rate: $500* Doctor (Black, 40’s any gender) - Rate: $300* Customer (Asian any gender, around 40) - Rate: $300* Worker (Female, open Ethnicity around 30) - Rate: $300PSA  #2: Elderly Woman (75–85): Rate: $500Mother (40): Middle Eastern or Latina preferred - Rate: $500Father (around 45): White - Rate: $500Teenage Boy (15): White - Rate: $500Woman (50): White - Rate: $500Man (around 50): White - Rate: $500Young Black Woman (20’s) - Rate: $500Black Man (around 30) - Rate: $500Middle-aged Asian Man - Rate: $500If you fit the bill please send an email to:JodiPurdyCasting@gmail.comSubj:  PSA - List RoleIncludeName, Cell, Email, Location, Photos, Resume, Reel (If available), VideosI will reply to emails with further instructions!These are paid roles.Filming in Greater BostonOne Day Between 4/3 & 4/7YOU MUST SUBMIT PER INSTRUCTIONS TO BE CONSIDERED.  COMMENTING ON POSTS IS NOT SUBMITTING #casting #commercial #$500 #$300 #principal #extra #jodipurdycasting

items.text:
Twelve Casting Call
After a fatal car crash, Michael is given twelve seconds between life and death to relive the defining moments of his past—confronting love, loss, and regret—as he searches for a way to say goodbye to the person who matters most: his daughter, Lucy.

Michael

Male: 30’s 

Ethnicity: Any

Michael on his 30’s

 defined by the heavy intersection 

of grief and redemption. He is physically and

emotionally "soaked"—tense, weary, and 

gripped by the stress of a

life spent trying to outrun his past. 

Michael is a protector who 

"had to grow up fast," and

while he dies with regrets, 

his final moments are defined by a

selfless need to ensure his daughter, 

Lucy, knows she is loved.

Male: 30’s 

Ethnicity: Any

———————————————————————

The Guide

The Guide serves as the ethereal bridge 

between life and death. 

She is young (20’s) 

with golden-strawberry hair, 

possessing a "gentle, steady gaze" 

that suggests ancient

 wisdom despite her youthful appearance.

Her attire—a dark cloak over white robes—

visually represents the transition from the darkness 

of the void to the light of the afterlife. 

She is not a judge, but a witness; she watches

Michael’s memories with "grace" and "calm," 

Female: 20’s 

Ethnicity: Any

———————————————————————

Format: Short

Date: T.B.A

Status : Non-Union/Union

Location: MA/ RI

Compensation: Paid

Resumes - Headshots - Reels to :

Info@vipexproductions.com

items.text:
🎭 Children’s Drama Classes! 🎬
We’re excited to be launching more drama classes focused on acting for TV & Film right here in the local areas. Due to the success of the Beckenham sessions shown below, we will be opening more classes in Hayes and Orpington. 

These fun, confidence-building sessions are perfect for children who love performing, storytelling, or want to learn what it’s like to act on camera. 🌟

In our classes, students will learn:

🎬 Acting techniques for TV & Film

🎭 Improvisation and character work

📹 Camera confidence

✨ Communication and teamwork skills

Age Groups for Beckenham:

⭐️ 3-5 years

🧒 6–10 years

🎬 11–16 years

Age Groups for Orpington:

🧒 6–10 years

🎬 11–16 years

Age Groups for Hayes:

🧒 6–10 years

🎬 11–16 years

⭐️ 16-18

⚡ Visit our website to book or contact us. Limited spaces available.

If you’re a parent in Orpington, Beckenham, Bromley or Hayes and would like more information, send us a message and we’ll send over the details.

📧 agents@boomerangactors.com 

🎭 Spaces will be limited.

items.summary:
🎭 Children’s Drama Classes! 🎬
We’re excited to be launching more drama classes focused on acting for TV & Film right here in the local areas. Due to the success of the Beckenham sessions shown below, we will be opening more classes in Hayes and Orpington. 

These fun, confidence-building sessions are perfect for children who love performing, storytelling, or want to learn what it’s like to act on camera. 🌟

In our classes, students will learn:

🎬 Acting techniques for TV & Film

🎭 Improvisation and character work

📹 Camera confidence

✨ Communication and teamwork skills

Age Groups for Beckenham:

⭐️ 3-5 years

🧒 6–10 years

🎬 11–16 years

Age Groups for Orpington:

🧒 6–10 years

🎬 11–16 years

Age Groups for Hayes:

🧒 6–10 years

🎬 11–16 years

⭐️ 16-18

⚡ Visit our website to book or contact us. Limited spaces available.

If you’re a parent in Orpington, Beckenham, Bromley or Hayes and would like more information, send us a message and we’ll send over the details.

📧 agents@boomerangactors.com 

🎭 Spaces will be limited.
items.title: 🎭 Children’s Drama Classes! 🎬

Dzień dobry Warszawo 😊

28.03 ( sobota)

Zdjecia 6:20- 10:30

ZGŁOSZENIA PRZYJMUJE TYLKO NA MAILA I PEŁNE INFORMACJE!!

-imię i nazwisko

items.text:
POSZUKIWANI STAND-IN DO MIĘDZYNARODOWEJ PRODUKCJI
Poszukujemy osób, które wcielą się w rolę stand-in dla zagranicznych ambasadorów marki

🎯Kogo szukamy?

Osób, które są zbliżone wymiarami

👉są gotowe nauczyć się kilku zdań w danym języku (lub powiedzieć je fonetycznie)

👉mile widziane osoby, które już posługują się jednym z języków

💸Wysokie Stawki!!

🎥Terminy zdjęć i języki:

🔵 RALF (jęz. NIEMIECKI)

Dni zdjęciowe 7.04, 8.04, 9.04

WZROST: 168 / krótkie włosy / WYMIARY: KL. PIERSIOWA: 98 / PAS: 88, BIODRA: 99, BUT: 38/38

🔵 VINCENT (jęz. FRANCUSKI)

Dni zdjęciowe 10.04, 11.04

WZROST: 168 - Krótkie włosy

🔵 FRANK (jęz. WŁOSKI)

Dni zdjęciowe  12.04, 13.04, 14.04

WZROST: 186 - Krótkie włosy

SIZE: XL , SHOES: 44

🔵 CARLOS (jęz. HISZPAŃSKI)

Dni zdjęciowe 15.04, 16.04, 17.04

KRÓTKIE WŁOSY / WZROST: 172

SIZE: XL , SHOES 42

💌Zgłoszenia:

Prosimy o przesyłanie zgłoszeń poprzez maila:

Ludzie@unagimedia.pl

TYTUŁ: stand -in + nazwa postaci

items.text:
Urgent Casting Call - Unpaid- Student Project
Chapman AP - Muddy D

Genre: Comedy/ drama/ Mocumentary. 

Shooting date: April 17th – 19th

Logline: A delusional aspiring artist documents his own rise to fame in a self-made documentary—only to discover that his growing audience is laughing at him, forcing him to question his identity and whether to keep creating. 

Derek / 20-40 /  An aspiring “creative” who believes he’s on the brink of recognition, performing under the persona “Muddy D” with unshakable confidence. Beneath the ego is a deeply vulnerable man forced to confront the gap between his self-image and reality—and decide whether to keep creating anyway.

Mom / 30-80 / Derek’s mother. Warm, practical, and grounded in reality, she genuinely cares about her son and has supported him throughout his life. She has witnessed his creativity since childhood and still holds onto that version of him, even if she no longer fully understands what he is trying to become.

Linda / 30-80 / A regular at the dive bar. Observant, blunt, and unintentionally harsh. She represents the outside world’s honest (and often dismissive) perception of Derek.

Credit, meal and copy and gas comp provide

Non-union

Photo and reels to submit 

DM or email to zmao@chapman.edu

items.text:
**CASTING CALL – SHORT FILM (*****Me & the Homies*****) – VANCOUVER**

Looking for an actor (Black or Latino, male-presenting, able to play 16–18) for a supporting role in an upcoming independent short film.

**About the Film:**
*Me & the Homies* is a grounded coming-of-age story based on a real night growing up in LA. It follows a group of teenage friends over one night that starts fun and slowly turns darker, exploring loyalty, pressure, and identity.

**Role: “Stats”**
Sharp, observant, and lowkey funny. Stats is always reading the room and calling things out with a dry edge. He feels like one of the guys, but he’s more calculated than he lets on. When things get serious, his instincts kick in, he knows when to push and when to fall back. Strong presence, natural delivery, and subtle performance are key.

**Details:**
* Shoot Dates: April 10, 11 (night shoots)
* Location: Vancouver
* Non-union / Indie / Unpaid (meals + footage provided)

If interested, please send:
* Headshot / recent photo
* Demo reel (if available)
* Age + contact info

Email: mysticstylezfilm@gmail.com

🎬 **CASTING CALL – INDIE NO-BUDGET FILM** 🎬

Hi everyone! I’m looking to cast a **female actor** for a small but important role in an indie short film.

🎭 **Role:** Day Care Teacher
* Female
* Age: 30–40
* Warm, natural, and expressive presence

📍 **Location:** Surrey
📅 **Date:** 4th April
⏱️ **Duration:** Approx. 2 hours shoot

🎥 **Details:**
* Volunteer / non-paid position
* Light, manageable shoot with a small crew

✨ **What you’ll get:**
* IMDb credit
* Crafty (food & refreshments on set)
* Opportunity to be part of a passion-driven indie project

If you’re interested or know someone who fits the role, please send your **headshot and a link to any previous work** on **expressentryfilm@gmail.com**

Thank you! 🙏

message.text:
The Big Barry Show Pilot Episode

Barry once dreamed of seeing his name in lights. He had the talent, the charm, and just enough stubborn optimism to believe an acting career could pull him and his young son into a better life. But dreams don’t always pay the bills, and desperation has a way of blurring the line between risk and ruin.

DMD Films/4Deuce Films

A great performance from Victor Ikenga, Olivier Kitenge, Brooke, and Anaïs Dahl

written by Dean Foster

#acting #Barry #audition #judges #casting #comedy #scene

items.text:
Har du god energi på kamera og elsker shopping, hverdagsinspiration og formidling? 📸 Så er det måske dig, vi leder efter som vært til City 2’s sociale medier.

Vi søger 1 vært, der har lyst til at være ansigtet udadtil på City 2’s kanaler og formidle content på en naturlig og imødekommende måde. Vi står for optagelse, redigering og alt det praktiske – du skal blot være ansigtet udadtil og får et færdigt script med det, der skal siges.

Om rollen:
• Medvirken i månedligt content til TikTok, Instagram og Facebook.
• Frekvens: Optages én gang om måneden.
• Optagelser foregår i City 2 Shoppingcenter.
• Tidsrum: kl. 13–16.
• Content bruges både organisk og til paid annoncering. Organisk annoncering er gratis opslag, der vises naturligt til følgere og andre brugere. Paid annoncering er opslag, man betaler for, så de vises til flere og udvalgte målgrupper.
• Script sendes på forhånd, så der er god tid til forberedelse.

Vi leder efter dig, der:
• Har god energi og er naturlig på kamera.
• Har en imødekommende og troværdig udstråling.
• Er tryg ved at tale til kamera og skabe nærvær.
• Er fleksibel og kan indgå i en løbende content-plan.
• Har erfaring fra lignende opgaver (bare en bonus)

Praktisk info.:
• Løn på dagsbasis

Sådan søger du:
• Send mig en kort video (30–60 sek.), hvor du formidler et valgfrit budskab til kamera – fx om noget, du holder af, dig selv eller en hverdagsoplevelse. MAIL: Simone@beyond11.dk.

👉 Går du med en vært gemt i maven 
– eller kender du én, der kunne være et godt match? Så hører vi meget gerne fra dig.

items.text:
🌿✨ **STATISTER SØGES – MØDRE MED BARN** ✨🌿

Vil du og dit barn være med i en hyggelig optagelse i smukke, naturlige omgivelser? 🎬💚

Vi søger **mødre med barn** til at agere statister i en havescene. Det bliver en rolig og hyggelig dag med fokus på nærvær og naturlige øjeblikke 🌸

👩‍👧 **Hvem søger vi?**

* Mødre med barn/børn på maks 10 år.

* Jer der har lyst til at være foran kamera i uformelle rammer

* Ingen erfaring nødvendig

📍 Juulsøgaarden: Lavenvej 22, 8600 Skanderborg.

⏰ lørdag og søndag (4 og 5 april)

💰 Jobbet er ulønnet - I vil dog være garanteret en sjov og hyggelig dag, samt jeres navn på rollelisten🙌

Lyder det som noget for jer? 💫

Eller vil du bare høre lidt mere?…

..Send en mail til darchyproductions@gmail.com eller send en direkte besked til mig – vi glæder os til at høre fra jer!

Del meget gerne opslaget 🙏

message.text:
TikTok is a GOATED tool for marketing research. 

I’ve been working with Dig Projects on some real people castings over the past few months, mixing my love of field producing with consumer behavior, and because of TikToks that I’ve made (like this), each paid project has been getting 300+ Google form submissions within the first few days alone. 

The number of passionate individuals I’ve been getting to meet — and who sometimes fall into really specific demographics — has been astounding, but really just shows how connected we all can be. 

As problematic as social media is sometimes, that truly is a beautiful upside. 🍻

That said… if you know of any Gen Z pancake/baking enthusiasts in Chicago… please fill out this form (or share and get that referral fee 💸)!

https://lnkd.in/gtSnWbjs

#marketingresearch #consumerbehavior #fieldproducing #castingcall #chicago #tiktok

items.text:
A bold new upcoming British South Asian Series Show is currently in development for major Streaming Platforms and entering it's casting phase. This project is a raw, hard-hitting drama thriller with elements of humour, exploring narratives based from real life society within the Desi British community. Drawing inspiration from titles such as Man Like Mobeen, Mogul Mowgli, Ill Manors, Bend It Like Beckham, Blinded By The Lights, Daytimers, Everywhere & Nowhere & Virdee. The series aims to authentically portray the urban underworld of British South Asian pop culture. 

🎭 ABOUT THE PROJECT
The story centres young people from South Asian backgrounds living in the UK, and international students navigating life in Britain/Europe. 

This is a multi-layered narrative covering: 

- Identity & belonging
- Family dynamics & generational conflict
- Love, relationships & marriage
- Crime & survival in urban environments
- Cultural expectations & taboo subjects
- Personal ambition and redefining success 

Each character will have a deep backstory, with storylines unfolding across drama, suspense, humour, and realism.
The project has already been seen successfully as a Theatre Stage Play production tester and is currently being developed for an on-screen series, with potential partnerships across major streaming platforms such as Netflix UK, BBC Films, BFI Film Council, Channel 4, ITV X Studios, Film Four, HBO Max, Hulu, Mubi, Amazon Prime Video, Apple TV+, Facebook Watch, Sky Studios, Plex, Paramount Pictures Plus, Pluto TV, Now TV, Channel Five, Peacock, Eros Now and B4U Motion Pictures Studios. 

🎬 WHO WE ARE CASTING 

We are seeking British South Asian (Desi) Talents: 

Must be UK born or raised within the UK with Strong understanding of British South Asian culture, including Social issues & taboo topics, music, arts, entertainment and Community dynamics with lived experiences. 

Age Range: 

Open to all age groups
Experienced and None-Experienced 

All Genders Can Apply

📍 LOCATION 

Auditions, rehearsals, and filming will take place in London. Rehearsals held at a North London studio base. Some filming may occur in other UK locations depending on production needs. 

🎥 PRODUCTION DETAILS 

Project currently in development, writing, and script editing stage. Selected applicants will take part in:
Rehearsals, Character development, Minor Stunt coordination (If Required) 

Refreshments and facilities will be provided during rehearsals and production. 

💼 COMPENSATION 

This production forms part of a strategic development plan toward a full television adaptation. Compensation terms are structured as follows: 

Engagement at this stage is based on development participation agreements
upon successful transition into full production, formal contracts will be issued
with fees which align with industry standard rates (FAA/Union-Equivalent structures where applicable). Final compensation, including percentage participation and fees, will be determined by the financing team once full production budgets are in place. All financial terms will be clearly outlined and contractually agreed prior to principal. 

⚠️ IMPORTANT – READ BEFORE APPLYING 

We are casting for Serious, Committed, and Professional applicants Only. 

❌ NO time-wasters. Applications will be removed if this information is ignored.
❗ Read all information carefully before applying. If you dismiss this instruction, your application will be automatically Deleted. 

✅ Only apply if you are:
Fully Committed and Flexible with availability. Ready to engage. Applicants who demonstrate professionalism and attention to detail will be prioritised for casting interviews. 

🚀 WHAT WE OFFER 

Opportunity to be part of a groundbreaking British South Asian series with Character development and performance training. Support in personal Branding/Growth and marketing
Collaboration. Whether you are represented by an agent or independent, you are welcome to apply provided you are contractually available. 

📩 NEXT STEP 

Shortlisted applicants will be invited to a Casting Interview Screening where full character breakdowns and project direction will be discussed in detail. Confirmed applicants will be called in for a Test Shoot later on in the season. 

Ideally we are Casting London based talents. Although if you are not from London and want to get involved, you are welcome to if you are open to travelling. Although this will be Your responsibility if you are able to reach call times as scheduled. 

To Apply, simply Facebook Inbox or E-Mail your Portfolio, Credentials if you own any with your Contact Info. Do Not apply if you cannot provide any form of contact details. Mention your Availability of the best Time/Date when to reach out to you. 

E-Mail: Ahmedsy_jaber@hotmail.com

items.groupTitle: Casting Calls & Acting Auditions in London / UK
items.title: (no title)

items.text: I’m forming a community of character walking tour guides. Guides will run themed tours in Central London. I work as an agent/representative. Guides work independently, as freelancers. Guides pay a monthly membership fee, this gives each guide representation and promotion on my website and a profile page and individual booking page. Guides also receive promotional material ( business cards & QR codes ) but guides are encourage to self promote. The tours are run  on a ‘pay what you like ‘ basis. This means that the customer tips the guide at the end of the tour. The guide keeps 100% of their tips. I’m casting a fully inclusive ensemble of Cockney characters, inspired by figures from old London history and favourite musical theatre characters. Guides will be welcoming, friendly personalities, costumed characters giving historical and cultural insights and telling stories from a unique perspective. I’m holding informal interviews in Mid April. Please register your interest in the comments and I will get back to you.

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'Time Step TOURS'

topComments.text: Scam alert, No job should ever charge you for any membership for work 🚩 🚩 🚩

Do you have experience with guiding? If so, can you share your history with it? I’ve been a freelance and private guide for 10+ years, so I would want the details. 
Tour guiding in London is extremely saturated as an industry, and it’s pretty well discussed that the industry is moving away from the pay-what-you-like model. So I’m wondering what your plan is for that.

And like, who exactly are you representing guides to? There are a dozen well established guiding agencies that work with every hostel, education, and tour group. Those bids are crazy hard to get for companies. 
And then rich travellers are just paying for a blue badge.

items.title: CASTING CALL!

items.text:
Casting Call!!!

“Two pairs of Legs, Lennon and Lindsey embrace the challenging journey to explore if their continuous encounters really are just coincidences.”

Hello!  That was the logline of my short film which I’m currently directing called Legs! I am a student studying Film Practice at University Of the Arts London. 

Legs is a comedy based around a pair of Legs! Set in present day London we explore the nature of the invisible string theory. The film has heavy inspiration from Wes Anderson, LaLaLand, and the silent era. 

We are currently seeking two male dancers to take upon the role of Lennon (the main lead) and the ex-partner of the female lead (the antagonist). 

Legs is a dialogue free film due to its heavy inspiration from the silent era. Due to this these roles require actors to move very expressively with their legs, as the legs are the entire character's personality, emotions, and identity.

We will be shooting the film from the 23rd to the 30th of April. So, we ask to keep those days as available if you are interested. 

We are also seeking 2 voice actors, the male and female lead which will be crucial to communicate the emotions via non-verbal vocalisations. 

We will be recording voice acting the week after shooting.

If interested in more than just acting or just voice acting feel free to apply for both positions!

Most locations will be shot in the London borough of Southwark and food and travel will be covered. However, we have a very limited budget, so we are not able to pay any actors beyond that.  

But this will be a great opportunity to expand your portfolio, and work on a production where you will get to challenge yourself with something potentially new to you!

If you are interested contact me via this post or email my producer :

I.pugh0320251@arts.ac.uk

Instagram: @iolopzs

items.text:
🎤 ⭐️ 𝐔𝐰𝐚𝐠𝐚! 𝐎𝐬𝐭𝐚𝐭𝐧𝐢 𝐭𝐲𝐝𝐳𝐢𝐞𝐧́ 𝐳𝐠ł𝐨𝐬𝐳𝐞𝐧́ 𝐝𝐨 𝐎𝐠𝐨́𝐥𝐧𝐨𝐩𝐨𝐥𝐬𝐤𝐢𝐞𝐠𝐨 𝐊𝐨𝐧𝐤𝐮𝐫𝐬𝐮 𝐖𝐨𝐤𝐚𝐥𝐧𝐞𝐠𝐨! 🥰

🎤 Złap oddech. Daj się ponieść głosowi.

⭐️ Zapraszamy solistów, duety i zespoły z całej Polski do udziału w wyjątkowym konkursie wokalnym, w którym pracujemy nad tym, co w śpiewie najważniejsze — świadomym oddechem i swobodnym prowadzeniem dźwięku.

Pokaż, jak Twój głos potrafi brzmieć, gdy daje mu się przestrzeń.
Nie liczy się wiek — liczy się pasja i chęć rozwoju.
Dołącz do nas i pozwól swojemu głosowi naprawdę wybrzmieć.
Zgłoszenia trwają już tylko 7 dni!

🏅 Na każdego uczestnika czeka dyplom, webinar oraz e-book na temat oddechu, a na laureatów I, II i III miejsca statuetki! ️

link do regulaminu: [https://www.laboratoriumdzwiekow.pl/.../konkurs.../regulamin](https://www.laboratoriumdzwiekow.pl/.../konkurs.../regulamin)

link do karty zgłoszenia: [https://www.laboratoriumdzwiekow.pl/.../formularz-zgloszenia](https://www.laboratoriumdzwiekow.pl/.../formularz-zgloszenia)

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'ZGŁOSZENIA DO:: LABORATORIUM DŻWIĘKÓW ZAPRASZA NA: OGÓLNOPOLSKI COLNOPOLSKLK KONKURS WOKALNY ODDECH KTÓRY NIESIE 03 KWIETNIA OSTATNI TYDZIEŃ ZGŁOSZEN Bo KAŻDY GŁOS ZACZYNA SIĘ OD ODDECHU.'

items.text:
‼️ UWAGA GÓRNY ŚLĄSK ‼️
Zapraszamy do udziału w fabularnym serialu kryminalnym, realizowanym na terenie Górnego Śląska. 🔥 Gwarantujemy fajną zabawę i świetną atmosferę - SERDECZNIE ZAPRASZAMY❗️

Jeśli masz mocny, charakterystyczny wygląd — to może być coś dla Ciebie.

❇️ KOGO ZAPRASZAMY: groźne wyglądających Panów (w wieku ok. 35-55 lat), mile widziane tatuaże i umięśnienie, mogą być także blizny (do zagrania są 3 sceny, plan dzienny).

✅ KIEDY i GDZIE:

31.03 (wt.), plan w MIKOŁOWIE (10 min spacerem od dworca PKP).

💰WYNAGRODZENIE za udział w planie:  300 zł netto, płatne po planie.

⬇️ KOMPLETNE ZGŁOSZENIE zawierające poniższe dane, wyślij:

📲 WhatsApp / SMS: +48 660 543 967

📩 e-mail: 123cast.serial@gmail.com

📌 Tytuł zgłoszenia: „Areszt 31.03”

W mailu / komunikatorze podaj wszystkie poniższe dane, dokładnie wg. tej formatki ⬇️:

—

* Imię i nazwisko

* Nr telefonu

* E-mail

* Miejsce zamieszkania

* Datę urodzenia

* Wzrost (cm)

* Wagę (kg)

* Rozmiar obuwia (EU)

📸 Dołącz 2 aktualne zdjęcia:

* portret;

* sylwetka.

Zdjęcia powinny być zrobione telefonem:

❌ bez innych osób w kadrze;

❌ bez okularów;

❌ bez nakrycia głowy.

⚠️  UWAGA, odezwiemy się do wybranych w procesie castingowym osób.

Do zobaczenia na planie 🎬

—

𝘗𝘩𝘰𝘵𝘰 𝘣𝘺 𝘔𝘪𝘭𝘢𝘥 𝘍𝘢𝘬𝘶𝘳𝘪𝘢𝘯 𝘰𝘯 𝘜𝘯𝘴𝘱𝘭𝘢𝘴𝘩, 𝘮𝘢𝘥𝘦 𝘣𝘺 𝘌𝘔.

items.text:
Szukam pracy – Skarżysko-Kamienna / Radom / Szydłowiec

Mam 24 lata i pilnie szukam pracy. Interesuje mnie:
• wykładanie towaru
• roznoszenie ulotek
• pomoc kuchenna (mam doświadczenie – jestem kucharzem)

Jestem osobą odpowiedzialną, uczciwą, miłą i sumienną. Szybko się uczę i dobrze odnajduję się w pracy zespołowej.

Nie posiadam samochodu, więc interesuje mnie praca z dogodnym dojazdem.

📸 **Szukam osób na sportową sesję TFP w plenerze – jeszcze w tym tygodniu!** 🌿🏃🚴🎾

Cześć!
Szukam chętnych osób do **sportowej sesji zdjęciowej TFP** w plenerze **na ten tydzień**.

Klimat sesji: **ruch, energia, natura i sportowe emocje** 💥
Interesują mnie ujęcia w takich stylach jak:
* 🚴 jazda na rowerze
* 🏃 bieganie
* 🎾 tenis
* 🔥 trening outdoor
* 🪢 skakanka
* 💪 ćwiczenia na świeżym powietrzu

Chcę stworzyć dynamiczne, naturalne kadry wśród zieleni, parków, lasu albo miejskich terenów sportowych.

📍 Plener na zewnątrz
📅 Termin: **ten tydzień do 02.04.2026**
🤝 Sesja na zasadach **TFP** — zdjęcia dla Ciebie i do mojego portfolio

Jeśli lubisz sportowy klimat, aktywność i chcesz mieć mocne, profesjonalne zdjęcia — napisz priv 💬
