items.text:
**JELENIA GÓRA i okolice**

**Plan zdjęciowy w JESTED,** **CZECHY**

**Zapewniamy transport z Jeleniej Góry.**

**14-15 kwietnia**

Do biograficznego filmu fabularnego osadzonego w latach 70tych, szukam Statystów jako:

 **- TECHNICY / WOJSKOWI  - wiek ok. 20-50 lat – na 14 i 15 kwietnia** (może być 1 dzień lub 2)

**- BARMAN **– góralska knajpa, **ok. 30-50 lat**, na **15 kwietnia**

**- KELNERKA **– góralska knajpa, **dziewczyna ok. 20-35 lat – na 15 kwietnia**

Przed zdjęciami, prawdopodobnie 13 kwietnia – strzyżenie panów jeśli będzie taka potrzeba. 

**Stawka: 140 zł za dzień zdjęciowy + jednorazowo 50 zł dodatkowo za charakteryzację czyli strzyżenie (dotyczy tylko panów)**

**Wytyczne charakteryzacji:**

**MĘŻCZYŹNI: **

- WŁOSY- raczej dłuższe, nachodzące na uszy i kark. Nieakceptowane są włosy obcięte bardzo krótko maszynką, wygolone boki i kark, wycięte wzorki na włosach oraz nienaturalne kolory oraz farbowane np. na czarny.

- ZAROST – brak, ogoleni na gładko. Tutaj wyjątkiem na pewno może być Barman :)

**KOBIETY:**

- WŁOSY – preferowana długość do ramion lub dłuższe ,mogą być farbowane na jeden kolor, mogą być z odrostami. Wykluczone są pasemka, balejage, ombre, sombre itp.

- PAZNOKCIE - preferowane naturalne krótkie lub opiłowane w kształt migdała, mogą być pomalowane na czerwono lub zbliżone kolorem oraz naturalne. Nieakceptowane są długie paznokcie 

opiłowane w szpic lub kwadrat, zdobione, kolorowe lub french.

- TWARZ - najlepiej naturalna, bez widocznych zabiegów medycyny estetycznej, bez sztucznych, doczepianych rzęs, bez permanentnego makijażu

Wyborów dokonuje reżyser na podstawie zdjęć.

Zgłoszenia poproszę na adres: **ewelina.wika@podtytulem.pl**

W tytule: **JCZ 14/15**

W treści: imię i nazwisko, wiek, nr telefonu, miejscowość + wymiary: wzrost, rozmiar ubrania i buta

W załączniku: **ZDJĘCIE TWARZY - tylko z dnia zgłoszenia + zdjęcie z profilu (panowie) + aktualne ZDJĘCIE SYLWETKI**

ZDJĘCIE TWARZY - portretowe selfie w dziennym świetle, na wprost, patrząc w obiektyw. Bez żadnych filtrów. Bez okularów. Bez nakrycia głowy. Kolorowe.

ZDJĘCIE SYLWETKI – aktualne, cała sylwetka

Робота у цирку “Cirque Du Liban” у шоу “Fontana Show” 🎪

Контракт: з 30 квітня по 31 травня
Репетиції: з 20 квітня

• Зарплата: 2000$ на місяць
• Харчування: 300$
• Проживання в хороших апартаментах

• 1-2 вихідні на тиждень
• 1-2 шоу на день

Надсилайте резюме / фото / відео на Telegram/WhatsApp: +38 067 59 123 12

items.text:
CASTING CALL – LEAD ROLE
Galway - Ireland

Independent short film STILL LIFE is casting for the lead role of COOPER.

🎭 ROLE: COOPER 

Age: Late 20s – early 30s 

Gender: Open (all genders / non-binary encouraged) 

Accent: Open (Irish a plus, not essential)

This is a subtle, internal, performance-led role requiring strong screen presence and emotional depth.

✨ We are looking for: 

Naturalistic actors with strong screen presence, comfortable with stillness, silence, and nuance. Experience in film/TV preferred.

📍 Location: Ireland (Galway) 

📅 Shoot Dates: April 5th–6th 2026 

Rate: Paid & expenses +travel 

🎥 Audition: Self-tape (shortlisted actors will receive sides)

📩 To apply, please send: 

Headshot 

CV / Spotlight (if available) 

Showreel (if available) 

Location + availability 

Email: hello@prpam.ie 

Subject: COOPER CASTING

A character-driven indie exploring grief, memory, and the blurred line between reality and the supernatural.

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'CASTING CALL Seeking actors for GALWAY (SHORT FILM) short film shooting April 5th & & 6th in Galwa ROLE: COOPER (Lead) Non-binary, mid 20s-early 30s Open to all gender expressions Natural, grounded presence Strong emotional range (grief/inner conflict) Subtle, film-focused performance style PROJECT A character-driven short exploring themes grief with subtle supernatural elements. Intimate and performance-led. SHOOT DETAILS Galway 戦 April 5th 6th Short film/ proof of concept APPLY Please send: Headshot Showreel (or ecent self- - Short intro relevant experience Paid. hello@prpam.ie Subject line: COOPER CASTING -[Your Name] Open to both represented and non-represented actors.'

topComments.text: What happens to people after they hit, say, 35?  Logan's Run, perhaps?  Can anyone out there make a film about someone older that post-adolescence?

items.text:
OPEN CASTING CALL (casting for supporting roles)

Please send any submissions to: theanswershortfilm26@gmail.com

Logline:
A respected working actor appears to have everything, career momentum, a loving family, and control over his life, until subtle cracks reveal he may be performing the very reality he refuses to confront.

Location: Los Angeles 

Submission Deadline: April 1st 

Shoot Date: April 18th

Non Paid/Non Union

items.text:
DONNA GROSSMAN CASTING  -NOW CASTING — ACTOR MOMS WITH THEIR OWN 6 - 8 MONTH OLD BABY

Non‑Union • Goat Milk for Babies

We’re casting a real mother, who is an actor, and her baby for a warm, authentic, user-generated style video campaign.

Production is looking for a genuine, playful mother-baby connection, and the natural rhythm that only comes from a real parent and child.

MOM
25–35 years old

Dark hair / US Latina or mixed‑race look preferred, but open to all

Strong with conversational copy (NO ACCENTS)

Warm, natural, responsive to baby, comfortable ad‑libbing

BABY
6–8 months old

Expressive, curious, babbly, sweet

Not too much hair (still very baby‑like)

RATES + USAGE
Mom Session: $750 + 20%

Baby Session: $500 + 20%

Mom Usage (If Final video/stills are used): $7,000 + 20%

Baby Usage (If Final video/stills are used): $3,000 + 20%

Usage: 1‑year worldwide digital/social (no broadcast)

ONE SHOOT DAY:
Week of April 6 or April 13

To submit, please email Dgcasting@donnagrossmancasting.com with your name, your baby’s age, and recent photos.

* Special Note: Baby will not need to drink goat milk.

items.text: Hello! Seeking an older Latina actress(NON UNION) to portray a Caribbean grandmother who is also a Santería priestess (Santera) for a play in Jersey City on 6/7/2026. This character is deeply rooted in spiritual tradition and community life: wise, grounded, and quietly authoritative. She carries generational knowledge, ritual presence, and emotional depth, serving as a moral and spiritual anchor within the story. REQUIREMENTS: Fluent Spanish speaker (all dialogue is in Spanish), Strong character and presence-driven performance, Ability to convey warmth, wisdom, and spiritual authority, Caribbean cultural background or lived familiarity preferred, Experience portraying elders, spiritual leaders, or grounded character role. RATE: 350 (est. 20 hours of work). PLEASE SEND MATERIALS TO INFO@GISELLE.US

items.text:
Hi everyone! I'm seeking participants to join an upcoming PAID ($250) focus group in the LA area for a restaurant/food delivery project. In particular, we're still looking for people with unique "R" names (Reese, Reagan, Raynard, etc).

Tentative Date: April 13th - Approx. 4 Hours.

Email: SeanAlexCasting@gmail.com or dm me for more info!

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'PAID! $$ HAVE A UNIQUE FIRST NAME? Looking For: Reese, Reagan, Have you ever been part of a focus group before? How often does your name get misspelled? How often are you called the wrong name? Would you change your name if you could? What's the weirdest name a coffee shop has written on your cup? Email SeanAlexCasting@gmail.com To Apply Reese, Reagan, Reece Ress?? Email SeanAlex SeanAlexCasting@gmail.com To Apply'

sharedPost.text:
NOW CASTING FOR A NEWBORN TO 11-MONTH-OLD HISPANIC BABY FOR A HEALTHCARE COMMERCIAL!

Angela Boehm Casting is looking for a Hispanic baby for a Healthcare Commercial that will be filming in the NE Ohio area the week of April 13th, 2026.

If you have already auditioned, no need to resubmit. We already have your audition :) 

*Please see below for more details*

DETAILS:

Project: Healthcare Commercial 
Usage: Local/regional healthcare 
TV, Social and Web 
VIDEO Use ONLY - NO Digital Stills or Print use
Filming Location: NE Ohio Area
Shoot Dates: The week of April 13th

Pay Rate: USAGE Plus 1 Shoot Day (Up to 8 hrs Only) 
Child (12 + Under) $1250 + 20% A. Fee
1 year buyout and usage fee renewable

Submission & Selections: Video submission. A current photo and full body also needed. We do not need to see photos in advance, just include them with the video.

Submission Deadline: ASAP; Wednesday, April 1st 9:00am at the latest

Roles & Creative Specs:

Slate instructions: Name, Agent (or phone if you’re not with an agent), Age, and any conflicts with filming dates (note: it is ideal to have none :)). Please state if you are a real family auditioning (as well as state the family member’s names and the role they are auditioning for). No need to state your location, but please note this is a local hire to NE Ohio.

Audition Directions:

Please do not tape outside
Please have a blank background
Please put slates at the end of the audition.
Please keep all videos between 50-100mb!!!

Baby, newborn-11 months (Hispanic) A young mother, sits up in bed with her young baby. A 1-year-old. The baby cries. (Which we can do with sound effects from the reverse view without needing to have the actual baby crying). Her husband (any race) 28 sits next to them and tries to comfort her. Home environment description: A modest home. A starter home. Maybe even an apartment feel. This is a younger family who’s starting out. Please do one take and have the child do the action alone. For a second take you can be in the audition to help your child with the action if you’re willing to be in the commercial with her if chosen.

*When auditioning - less is MORE!

All submissions must be emailed to angela@angelaboehmcasting.com with subject line "Hispanic Baby" ASAP or by Wednesday, April 1st at 9:00AM. Please no YouTube links.  Send submissions via WeTransfer or Dropbox.   

Please share with anyone who may fit the specs, as this is a difficult find. Thank you in advance! 

Kind regards,
Angela Boehm Casting Team
